# Brandon Fluegel, Ph.D. — Staff UX Researcher

Canonical: https://humanfactors.pro/
Primary identity: Brandon Fluegel, Ph.D.
Role focus: Staff UX Researcher
Specialties: Human Factors, UX Research, Human-AI Interaction, Product Strategy

Summary:
Brandon Fluegel is a staff-level UX researcher with Human Factors and AI expertise. Portfolio work spans Amazon, Sling TV, Uber, NASA, and Mercedes-Benz, with impact across monetization, engagement, and cognitive load reduction.

Core query topics:
- Human Factors Research
- UX Research
- AI UX Research
- Human-AI Interaction
- Staff UX Researcher
- Product Strategy Research
- Experimental Design
- Psychophysics
